_meta.title: OSS/IOSS Decision Tree
_meta.description: Machine-readable decision tree for Afframe AI advisor to determine OSS/IOSS obligations for Czech taxable persons
advisor_questions: Q-20260523-114: CZK equivalent of EUR 10,000 in 2026
Q-N2D5-006: EUR 150 IOSS threshold amendment status 2026

Q1.question: Does the entity sell goods or services B2C to consumers in EU Member States other than CZ?
Q1.note: B2C = customer is a private person (non-taxable). If all EU sales are B2B, go to B2B branch (reverse charge, not OSS).

Q2.question: What type of B2C cross-border supply is it?

branches.label: Physical goods shipped from CZ to EU consumers
TBE or electronically supplied services (SaaS, streaming, e-books, digital downloads)
Goods imported from outside EU (seller ships from non-EU country to EU consumer)
Other B2C services (non-TBE) with place of supply in destination MS

Q3.question: What is the total annual value of all qualifying B2C cross-border supplies (goods + TBE services combined) to all EU MS combined?
Q3.threshold_czk_note: CZK equivalent approximate only; confirm 2026 exact figure (Q-20260523-114)

Q4_BELOW.question: Did the entity exceed EUR 10,000 in qualifying B2C cross-border supplies in the PREVIOUS calendar year?
Q4_BELOW.note: Prior-year breach locks in destination-country DPH from 1 January of current year.

Q5_ABOVE.question: Does the entity dispatch any goods from warehouses or fixed establishments in EU Member States other than CZ?

Q6.question: Is the entity already registered for OSS in CZ?

Q_IOSS.question: Is the intrinsic value of each individual consignment (parcel) EUR 150 or less?
Q_IOSS.note: Intrinsic value = goods value only, excluding separately stated shipping and insurance.

Q_IOSS_2.question: Are the goods subject to excise duty (alcohol, tobacco, mineral oils)?

Q_IOSS_3.question: Is the entity (or marketplace) established in the EU?

Q_IO_CHECK.question: Does the entity purchase goods from other EU MS (B2B) above CZK 326,000 per year, or receive B2B services from EU/non-EU suppliers with place of supply in CZ?
Q_IO_CHECK.note: IO and OSS are independent obligations. Both can apply simultaneously.

RESULT_NO_OSS.label: No OSS obligation
RESULT_NO_OSS.description: Entity sells only domestically (CZ) or B2B to EU. No OSS registration needed. For B2B EU services: reverse charge applies via § 9 Act 235/2004 (not OSS).
actions: Continue with domestic CZ DPH DAP
For B2B EU services: issue invoice without CZ DPH, include buyer VAT number, file souhrnné hlášení

RESULT_CZ_DPH_OR_VOLUNTARY_OSS.label: Below EUR 10,000 threshold — CZ DPH applies (or voluntary OSS election)
RESULT_CZ_DPH_OR_VOLUNTARY_OSS.description: Entity may charge Czech DPH (currently 21%/12%) on all cross-border B2C supplies. No mandatory OSS registration. May voluntarily elect OSS if preferred (locks in for 2+ calendar years).
actions: Report cross-border B2C sales in standard CZ DAP
Consider voluntary OSS if growth expected to exceed EUR 10,000 soon
RESULT_CZ_DPH_OR_VOLUNTARY_OSS.warning: Monitor annual cumulative total. The threshold can be breached at any point in the year.

RESULT_REGISTER_OSS_CZ.label: Register for OSS (Union scheme) with CZ Finanční správa
RESULT_REGISTER_OSS_CZ.description: Entity exceeds EUR 10,000 threshold. Must register for OSS or directly register in each destination MS. OSS (Union scheme via CZ) is the recommended path for multi-country EU B2C sellers.
actions: Register at adisreg.financnisprava.cz (confirm current URL — Q-N2D5-002)
Open EUR bank account
Set up 343.OSS sub-account in accounting system
Configure e-shop checkout with per-country VAT rates
Set up quarterly OSS přiznání filing reminder
RESULT_REGISTER_OSS_CZ.filing: Quarterly OSS přiznání, due last day of following month

RESULT_OSS_REGISTERED.label: Continue with existing OSS registration
RESULT_OSS_REGISTERED.description: Entity already registered. File quarterly OSS přiznání with per-MS, per-rate breakdown.
actions: File quarterly
Pay in EUR by deadline
Maintain 10-year records per transaction

RESULT_MIXED_DIRECT_REGISTRATION.label: Mixed obligation: OSS for CZ-dispatched sales + direct registration in MS of warehouse
RESULT_MIXED_DIRECT_REGISTRATION.description: Supplies from CZ warehouse: use OSS. Supplies from foreign warehouse (Amazon FBA, etc.): direct VAT registration required in that MS. OSS cannot cover supplies dispatched from outside CZ.
actions: Register OSS in CZ for CZ-dispatched B2C sales
Register for VAT directly in each MS where a warehouse is located
Segregate reporting by dispatch origin

RESULT_STANDARD_CUSTOMS.label: Standard import customs procedure — IOSS not applicable
RESULT_STANDARD_CUSTOMS.description: Consignment value > EUR 150, or goods are excise goods. Standard import DPH collected at EU border by customs. No IOSS.
actions: Ensure customs documentation correct
Import DPH included in cost basis if buyer is non-plátce

RESULT_IOSS_DIRECT_REGISTRATION.label: Register for IOSS with CZ Finanční správa (EU-established seller)
RESULT_IOSS_DIRECT_REGISTRATION.description: Goods ≤ EUR 150 per consignment from outside EU to EU consumers. Register IOSS directly with CZ Finanční správa. Collect DPH at checkout at destination-country rate. Monthly IOSS return.
RESULT_IOSS_DIRECT_REGISTRATION.filing: Monthly IOSS přiznání, due last day of following month
actions: Register at CZ Finanční správa IOSS portal
Set up 343.IOSS sub-account
Configure checkout for consumer-country DPH rate
Include IOSS number in all customs declarations

RESULT_IOSS_INTERMEDIARY.label: Non-EU seller: must use EU-established IOSS intermediary (*zprostředkovatel*)
RESULT_IOSS_INTERMEDIARY.description: Non-EU sellers cannot register for IOSS directly. Must appoint an EU IOSS intermediary who registers in their MS and is jointly liable for DPH compliance.
RESULT_IOSS_INTERMEDIARY.escalation: Advisor consultation required — select and appoint EU zprostředkovatel
actions: Find EU-established IOSS zprostředkovatel (fiscal representative)
Sign intermediary agreement
Provide all sales data to zprostředkovatel monthly

RESULT_IO_ALSO_REQUIRED.label: IO registration also required — independent of OSS
RESULT_IO_ALSO_REQUIRED.description: Entity triggers IO status (EU goods pořízení > CZK 326,000 or B2B services from EU/non-EU). IO must be registered with Finanční správa separately from OSS.
actions: Register as identifikovaná osoba (§ 6c Act 235/2004)
File IO samovyměření přiznání for inbound EU B2B transactions
Note: IO cannot deduct input DPH (only samovyměření, no nárok na odpočet)

RESULT_OSS_ONLY.label: OSS registration only — no IO obligation
RESULT_OSS_ONLY.description: Entity needs OSS for outbound B2C sales but does not trigger IO threshold for inbound purchases.
actions: Proceed with OSS registration per RESULT_REGISTER_OSS_CZ

b2b_digital_services._note: B2B digital/TBE services are NOT part of OSS. They use reverse charge.
b2b_digital_services.rule: If customer provides a valid VAT number → B2B → reverse charge in destination MS → invoice without CZ DPH → include in souhrnné hlášení (SH). See W1.4-07-intracom.md.
b2b_digital_services.legal_basis: Act 235/2004 Sb. § 9 odst. 1 (B2B place of supply = customer country)

eu_vat_rate_note: AI must NOT hardcode EU member state VAT rates. Use a maintained rate table (see 70-ai-platform/). Rates change by country and can be updated. Example rates at 2026-05-23: DE 19%, PL 23%, AT 20%, FR 20%, HU 27%, SE 25%, NL 21%.
